basic_details.job_title: NFSU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The National Forensic Sciences University (NFSU) has officially announced the Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification has been published on the official website. Candidates who meet the required eligibility criteria and hold a Master’s degree in Food Technology, Food Engineering, Plant Biotechnology, or allied disciplines (NET/GATE qualified candidates preferred) can submit their online applications on or before 22 July 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in food technology/ food engineering/ plant biotechnology or allied disciplines. NET/GATE qualified preferred.
qualification.details: Master's degree in food technology/ food engineering/ plant biotechnology or allied disciplines. Experience in hydrogel development or related research will be preferred.

salary_details.pay_scale: ₹36,000/- per month for NET/GATE, ₹23,213/- fixed for non-NET/GATE
salary_details.details: ₹36,000/- per month for NET/GATE qualified candidates (Initially, for a period of one year) ₹23,213/- fixed for non-NET/GATE candidates (Initially, for a period of one year)

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NFSU to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NFSU Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NFSU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NFSU Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

NFSU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NFSU to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NFSU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NFSU Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Junior Research Fellow position at NFSU is 22 July 2026. Ensure you apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in food technology, food engineering, plant biotechnology, or allied disciplines. NET/GATE qualification is preferred but not mandatory for all candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The salary is ₹36,000/- per month for candidates who are NET/GATE qualified. For those who are not NET/GATE qualified, a fixed stipend of ₹23,213/- per month will be provided.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow position at the National Forensic Sciences University.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the NFSU Junior Research Fellow recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to fill out the application form through the provided Google Form link.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the NFSU Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for this recruitment drive. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an initial shortlisting of eligible candidates based on their applications, followed by an interview for the final selection.

faq.question: Q8. Does NFSU offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Information regarding age relaxation for reserved categories is not explicitly detailed in the provided data. Candidates should refer to the official notification for specific details.

faq.question: Q9. What kind of experience is preferred for this role?
faq.answer: Candidates with prior experience in hydrogel development or related research fields will be preferred for the Junior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the link to the official notification and the online application form in the "Important Links" section of this article. The official website of NFSU is also provided for further information.
